notes: Beta build 2026.07.22-369 — Signal report card scoring made clearer: the Strength /10 now shows on 🧩 combinations, sequences and the up/down splits, and two-way flags (Block day, Vol record) no longer show a misleading pooled score — they defer to their up-day/down-day scores, matching the ladder. (Beta stays feature-matched to the released app, keeps the shared price cache for faster loads, and your beta portfolio stays fully separate.) Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5). ✉ feedback link top-left.
